use_codes.desc: USE OF TROKENDI XR FOR THE TREATMENT OF EPILEPSY
USE OF TROKENDI XR FOR PROPHYLACTIC TREATMENT OF MIGRAINE

indications.text:
1.1 Monotherapy Epilepsy
TROKENDI XR® is indicated in patients 6 years of age and older as initial monotherapy for partial onset or
primary generalized tonic-clonic seizures [see Clinical Studies (14.2)].
1.2 Adjunctive Therapy Epilepsy
